name: Angles

hooks.visual: Angles are everywhere — from clock hands to skateboard ramps to pizza slices
hooks.question: When clock hands point to 3 o'clock, what angle do they make? What about 6 o'clock?

realWorldContext: Angles shape the world around you: the tilt of a ramp determines how steep it is, architects use angles to design buildings, athletes adjust their launch angle for the best throw, and every turn you make on a skateboard or bicycle is measured in degrees.
reflectionPrompt: Why do you think the angles in any triangle always add up to exactly 180 degrees?
